role: This directory contains governance rules and conventions for the ArchSpine project, encompassing layered architecture boundaries and naming standards.
responsibility: Collectively, these files define and enforce architectural constraints (layered dependencies) and naming conventions (interface prefixes, test file suffixes) to ensure codebase consistency and structural integrity across the project.

children.role: Governance rules for maintaining layered architecture boundaries in the ArchSpine project
Defines specific naming convention rules to enforce codebase consistency.
